# removeTestObserver(_:)

**Instance Method**

Unregisters an object conforming to [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation] as an observer for the current test session.

## Declaration

```swift
func removeTestObserver(_ testObserver: any XCTestObservation)
```

## Managing Observers

- **addTestObserver(_:)**: Registers an object conforming to [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation] as an observer for the current test session.
